gates.name: manual_drop_dirs_outside_repo
gates.reason: Pending and label directories are outside the repo.

gates.name: no_execution_boundary
gates.reason: Builder emits research-only observation packets and no account/order fields.

method.edge_boundary: This builder never tests, promotes, sizes, or executes. It only prepares observations for falsification.
method.label_rule: Only pending rows with public settled Kalshi outcomes become labeled OOS observations.
method.pending_rule: Only rows with registered HypothesisCandidate IDs, calibrated model probabilities, all-in costs, and point-in-time decision/model/quote times become pending observations.
method.time_safety: The downstream OOS harness rejects rows unless quote_time <= decision_time, model_time <= decision_time, and decision_time < close_time <= settled_time.

next_action.name: wait_for_settlement_or_expand_calibrated_probability_coverage
next_action.stop_condition: Stop before using unresolved contracts as OOS proof.
next_action.why: Pending model-backed observations exist, but none have settled labels yet.
